title: Changing data format in excel report
excerpt:
All exported date columns are in format YYYY/MM/DD 
how i can change it to ours DD/MM/YYYY???

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
All exported date columns are in format YYYY/MM/DD

how i can change it to ours DD/MM/YYYY???

posts.author: alejencia (Alex Becerra)
posts.cookedHtml: @hlopezvc I have yet to find a way, but whoever gets to it first … please post here!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml: Just saw this… if it’s still an issue… you can just select the column and then set the date format.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
